name: Arjun Sharma
bio: Met in first year of university. We used to pull all-nighters before exams together. He moved to Dhaka for work last year.

name: Meher Nigar
bio: We grew up on the same street in Rajshahi. Still catch up every couple of weeks over phone calls.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: My senior at the office who helped me get through my first project. We grab lunch every week and talk tech and life.

name: Sadia Islam
bio: Best friends since class 6. She got married and moved to Chittagong. We keep meaning to video call more often.

name: Rafiq Ahmed
bio: Met at the local gym two years ago. We share a passion for fitness and often motivate each other to stay consistent.

name: Nadia Chowdhury
bio: We studied computer science together. She now works at a startup in Sylhet. Always has great advice on career decisions.

name: Imran Khan
bio: Met on a group trip to Cox's Bazar three years ago. We plan at least one trip together every year and stay in touch in between.

name: Farida Begum
bio: Our families have been close for decades. She is like an older sister to me. We talk almost every week about everything.

name: Shawon Mahmud
bio: My roommate for three years during university. We lost touch after graduation but always feel like no time has passed when we reconnect.

name: Priya Das
bio: We met at a local book club event in 2023. She has incredible taste in literature and always recommends something that changes my perspective.
